name: Lightning Axe
descs:
On Hit with Skills that consume [Charge] Count: inflict 1 [Burst] (3 times per Skill; including 'Unique Charge')

This E.G.O Gift's effects are enhanced based on the number of Identities in the Team loadout with Attack Skills that apply [Burst] or gain [Charge]. (except E.G.O Skills; counts all units in the Team)

- At 6+...
When dealing [Burst] damage to enemies, gain +1 [Charge] Count (3 times per Skill)

- At 8+...
On Hit with Skills that consume [Charge] Count, inflict +1 [Burst] Count (3 times per Skill; including 'Unique Charge')
